channel.title: Masara
channel.copyright: I think, therefore I am. - René Descartes

item.title: Ping_pong
item.description: Ping Pong challenge : CTFROOM INTERVARSITY COMPETITION I got to learn a lot of new tools from this recent forensics challange I did. As part of my note-taking, I have documentated the challenge which was part of CTFROOM Intervarsity Competition . The challenge has already been done in a walkthrough video by the creator of the challenge and is basically what I used to solve and learn the better part of the challenge.

item.title: Kamilimu
item.description: 🎓 I have received my certificate after my graduation at KamiLimu ! 🏆 What an amazing journey it has been! The 8 months at KamiLimu , I’ve experienced a transformation like never before. From a timid version of myself, I’ve blossomed into a courageous individual ready to take on any challenge that comes my way! 🚀. One of the most remarkable accomplishments during this period was conquering my fear of public speaking.

item.title: My Public CTF write-ups
item.description: TryHackMe CTF Rooms RootMe PicoCTF Rooms Cookies Hack The Box Labs Surveillance CTFROOM Ping Pong

item.title: PicoCTF_Cookies
item.description: Pico Web CTF : Cookies Hey there, Welcome to my page 😄.This is my first public CTF write-up. I chose to start with this challenge specifically because of how I find it to be a super beginner friendly challenge and I thought will find it to explain easily. I hope I don’t disappoint you 😏. This is a web CTF from PicoCTF called Cookies. This is what you get once you open it .

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hey There!! 👋 👋 Glad you are here 😄 .Thank you for taking your time to visit my website. Who Am I I’m James Angwenyi , but mostly go as MASARA I’m currently doing alot of exploring and learning I love to learn newer things in Cyber Security What am doing now I’m a final year Computer Science student I’m passionate about cybersecurity Currently, am continuously expanding and improving my skill set in the field.
